sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel data documented in source

special_mechanics.name: Power-ups
special_mechanics.description: Collectible items uncovered by destroying blocks that increase bomb count, firepower, speed, and grant special abilities such as remote control bombs, throwing bombs, and taking an extra hit

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics and design philosophy but contains no quantitative movement physics parameters. Game praised for superb control and balanced play according to contemporary reviews, but specific velocity, acceleration, or gravity values are not documented.
